architecture.name: municipal-performance-management-system
architecture.description: Comprehensive automated performance management system for South African municipal operations to track, analyze, and manage organizational KPIs, departmental metrics, and compliance standards over a 3-year implementation period

stack.ai: Claude API integration for performance insights and compliance assistant

modules.name: dashboard
modules.purpose: Executive dashboard with real-time KPI visualization and municipal performance overview

modules.name: kpi-management
modules.purpose: Define, configure, and manage municipal KPIs across departments

modules.name: data-collection
modules.purpose: Automated data collection from municipal systems and manual data entry

modules.name: reporting
modules.purpose: Generate statutory reports, performance reports, and compliance documentation

modules.name: user-management
modules.purpose: Role-based access control for municipal staff and external stakeholders

modules.name: compliance-tracking
modules.purpose: Track municipal compliance with regulations and performance standards

modules.name: notifications
modules.purpose: Automated alerts for performance thresholds, deadlines, and compliance issues

modules.name: audit-trail
modules.purpose: Comprehensive logging and audit trail for all system activities

apiEndpoints.description: Get municipal performance overview with key metrics
Get KPIs for specific municipal department
Generate specific report type (quarterly, annual, compliance)
Get current compliance status across all areas
Create new user account with role assignment
Get pending notifications for current user
Get audit trail for specific entity or action

aiChatbot.purpose: AI-powered performance management assistant to help municipal staff understand KPIs, compliance requirements, and system guidance
capabilities: Provide guidance on municipal compliance standards
Assist with report generation and interpretation
Help with system navigation and feature usage
Generate executive summaries of performance data
